name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: v0.6.0 + closed-trade widget bands frozen at ORIGINAL stop and 1.5R reference, not the broker's current (BE-locked / trailed) values. v0.5.0 read p.stop and p.tp directly, so on winners the stop band collapsed to 2 ticks (BE-locked value) and the target band stretched to 333 ticks (realized exit), making every closed widget visually wrong. Now: stopLevel = original_stop_price distance from entry (frozen), profitLevel = 1.5R from entry (frozen), x2 anchor still slopes to the actual exit_price/exit_time, headerText carries realized P&L. Plus v0.6.0's swing-folder routing for zone-member brush lines.
